title: Vendor in latest containers/image and containers/storage
body:
Changes to paramters in functions.
Change to the error returned by the oci and oci-archive transport.

Addresses https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/issues/558

Signed-off-by: umohnani8 <umohnani@redhat.com>
